rationale: The cited paper is a very close methodological predecessor: both notes describe market-structure mapping pipelines built around skip-gram product embeddings and t-SNE projection (P2V-MAP in 2019; M4 in 2023). The citing paper’s stated gap (prior maps miss multimarket membership) and method framing strongly suggest it is positioning against/extending this prior mapping stream rather than making a purely incidental mention, and the reference is an exact DOI match.
